assessor_raw: E-commerce transformer ranker experiment: methodologically sound. IPW position bias correction applied to both training and evaluation. Temporal split mirrors deployment. BPE tokenizer fit on training only. LambdaMART baseline receives equivalent tuning effort. NDCG@10 is appropriate for ranking. Human annotation sanity check provides calibration without contaminating training. Bootstrap CIs stratified by frequency decile are comprehensive. Scope correctly bounded to offline ranking quality. Verdict: defense_wins.
